intro: Minuria annua is a plant species, commonly known as annual minuria, that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The health benefits of Minuria annua include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory conditions, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Minuria annua is commonly used in traditional herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
